디모데전서 3:1.content: This is a faithful saying: someone who seeks to be an overseer desires a good work.

디모데전서 3:2.content: The overseer therefore must be without reproach, the husband of one wife, temperate, sensible, modest, hospitable, good at teaching;

디모데전서 3:3.content: not a drinker, not violent, not greedy for money, but gentle, not quarrelsome, not covetous;

디모데전서 3:4.content: one who rules his own house well, having children in subjection with all reverence;

디모데전서 3:5.content: (but how could someone who doesn’t know how to rule one’s own house take care of God’s assembly?)

디모데전서 3:6.content: not a new convert, lest being puffed up he fall into the same condemnation as the devil.

디모데전서 3:7.content: Moreover he must have good testimony from those who are outside, to avoid falling into reproach and the snare of the devil.

디모데전서 3:8.content: Servants, in the same way, must be reverent, not double-tongued, not addicted to much wine, not greedy for money,

디모데전서 3:9.content: holding the mystery of the faith in a pure conscience.

디모데전서 3:10.content: Let them also first be tested; then let them serve if they are blameless.

디모데전서 3:11.content: Their wives in the same way must be reverent, not slanderers, temperate, and faithful in all things.

디모데전서 3:12.content: Let servants be husbands of one wife, ruling their children and their own houses well.

디모데전서 3:13.content: For those who have served well gain for themselves a good standing, and great boldness in the faith which is in Christ Jesus.

디모데전서 3:14.content: These things I write to you, hoping to come to you shortly;

디모데전서 3:15.content: but if I wait long, that you may know how men ought to behave themselves in God’s house, which is the assembly of the living God, the pillar and ground of the truth.

디모데전서 3:16.content: Without controversy, the mystery of godliness is great: God was revealed in the flesh, justified in the spirit, seen by angels, preached among the nations, believed on in the world, and received up in glory.
